speaker: speaker2
text: Hi , Gary , what happened ? I was waiting for you at the theater . Why didn ’ t you meet me there ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I thought we were supposed to meet here .

speaker: speaker2
text: Don ’ t you know our movie starts at seven ? And we were going to meet at the theater at five to seven . Then it doesn ’ t make sense to meet at the apartment .

speaker: speaker1
text: I ’ m sorry . We must have misunderstood each other .

speaker: speaker2
text: Why don ’ t you try to be clearer about your intentions ?

speaker: speaker1
text: You ’ re right . I am sorry . Let ’ s go and watch the movie .

speaker: speaker2
text: It ’ s okay . I don ’ t want to go now . We ’ Ve already missed ten minutes of the movie . I don ’ t want to see a movie without watching the beginning .
